name: J1939TestJoinPGEvent
title: J1939TestJoinPGEvent
tables: long J1939TestJoinPGEvent( dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, dword pgn, )
long J1939TestJoinPGEvent( dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, dbMsg message )
Completes the current set of "joined events" with the transmitted event. This function does not wait.
sourceAddr source address of the PG or Null address (0xFE) for wildcard
destAddr destination address of the PG or Null address (0xFE) for wildcard. Ignored for broadcast PGs
pgn parameter group number to wait for
message parameter group definition from database
-3: Join error -1: General error, for example, functionality is not available >0: Number of the joined event

Example long lret;J1939TestJoinPGEvent(20, 0xFF, 0xF123);J1939TestJoinPGEvent(10, 0xFF, 0xF123);lret = J1939TestWaitForAnyJoinedEvent ( 500 );switch(lret) {case 1: // first PG received break;case 2: // second PG received break;default: // error, timeout or constrain violation break;}
